title: I Built an AI That Builds You a Course on Anything (In Seconds)
summary: Tristen O'Brien built an AI tool that generates personalized online courses based on user-specified topics and skill levels in under two minutes. The tool structures learning pathways using Claude, organizes content into syllabi, and includes an AI chatbot tutor for course interaction.
writeup: A developer demos a personal AI learning pathway builder that takes a topic, a target mastery level (on a 1-10 scale), and a short clarifying questionnaire, then uses Claude to generate a structured syllabus and automatically searches YouTube for the best matching video per section. The resulting course for an AI topic runs to 17.5 hours across seven sections, complete with embedded video playback, per-video transcripts, reading materials, and a context-aware Claude Opus 4.6 chatbot tutor. The through-line is that unstructured YouTube search fails learners, and a structured, personalized syllabus backed by a conversational tutor can replace both the search friction and the confusion about sequencing.
key_points: Claude generates a fully structured, beginner-to-advanced syllabus with sections and subtopics based on the learner's stated topic, mastery target, and prior knowledge, rather than returning generic search results.

For an AI course, the builder produces seven sections (AI foundations, machine learning, neural networks, natural language processing, computer vision, model development, advanced applications) totaling an estimated 17.5 hours of content.
YouTube videos are matched to each syllabus section by content relevance, not by popularity or view count, so each segment teaches exactly what the section plan requires.
A transcript button on each video transcribes the video in-platform, giving the learner copyable notes that can be fed directly to a language model for further questions.

The embedded chatbot tutor runs on Claude Opus 4.6 and is contextually grounded in the course content, so questions like 'explain machine learning like I am five' receive targeted answers within seconds.
